case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. FERNANDO QUINONEZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $246.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100162699) AS TO DEFENDANT QUINONEZ, FERNANDO
